sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, values_list LIST<INT>);
SELECT id, cos(id * 30) AS cosine_value FROM test_table WHERE values_list @> [cos(id * 30)];
SELECT DISTINCT id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table AS t2 WHERE t2.values_list @> t1.values_list) AS matching_lists FROM test_table AS t1 HAVING matching_lists > 1;
SELECT id, cos(NULLIF(NULL, 0)) AS cos_null_case FROM test_table WHERE values_list IS NOT NULL;

WITH cosine_values AS (SELECT id, cos(id * 45) AS angle_cos FROM test_table) SELECT cosine_values.id, cosine_values.angle_cos FROM cosine_values WHERE angle_cos BETWEEN 0 AND 1 ORDER BY angle_cos DESC;
SELECT id, values_list FROM test_table WHERE values_list @> (SELECT [2, 3] FROM test_table WHERE id = 1);
SELECT id, cos(id) AS cosine_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING cosine_value < cos(90);
